# `kitty-multicursor` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/kitty-multicursor.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Set Kitty Multiple Cursor Points (`kitty.multicursor.set_points`)

Fixture follows the main cursor shape at row 4, column 5.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > shape ; 2 : row : column SP q`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_points.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_points.seq)

## Set Kitty Multiple Cursor Rectangles (`kitty.multicursor.set_rectangles`)

Fixture sets a block cursor across one rectangle.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > shape ; 4 : top : left : bottom : right SP q`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_rectangles.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_rectangles.seq)

## Clear Kitty Multiple Cursors (`kitty.multicursor.clear_all`)

Clears all extra cursors using the full-screen rectangle form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > 0 ; 4 SP q`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_clear.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_clear.seq)

## Query Kitty Multiple Cursor Support (`kitty.multicursor.query_support`)

The spec recommends following this query with primary DA to avoid timeout waits.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > SP q`
- Responds with: `kitty.multicursor.support_report`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_support.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_support.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty no-reply; betamax no-reply; kitty no-reply; tmux no-reply; wezterm no-reply

## Kitty Multiple Cursor Support Report (`kitty.multicursor.support_report`)

Reports are preserved syntax today; typed event promotion can be added later.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## Query Kitty Multiple Cursors (`kitty.multicursor.query_cursors`)

Asks the terminal for currently active extra cursors.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > 100 SP q`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_cursors.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_cursors.seq)

## Query Kitty Multiple Cursor Colors (`kitty.multicursor.query_colors`)

Asks the terminal for the extra cursor color pair.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > 101 SP q`
- References: [kitty Multiple Cursors Protocol](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/multiple-cursors-protocol/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_colors.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/multicursor_query_colors.seq)
